what: Read each text file and extract frontmatter + content; no fields are required
why: Lenient parsing allows files with partial or no frontmatter to proceed to the enrichment step

success_handling.criteria: All files processed (some may be skipped if frontmatter is invalid)

error_handling.action: Add to skipped list with error reason, continue

decisions.rationale: A single bad file should not abort the entire import; it is tracked and reported
